details.redacted_summary: - If the user already explicitly says both script repair and AI repair were tried and still failed, directly mention 高明达（ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4） and 管志成（ou_17a0ae2d4c87a64e75294ea441084740） for follow-up instead of repeating the auto-repair guidance. 注意：不要误 @ 张瑞奇（ou_4514aa6582f32fd92d9c001fa3349f27）。 - Bot 经常“不响应”补充排查口径（管志成 2026-06-09）：openclaw-tui 不是 openclaw gateway；没响应时先看 WebUI 是否有工具调用，也可以换模型试试，很多时候是后台在干活或模型响应慢。 - Bot 不响应排查新增案例（管志成 2026-06-09）：Feishu 插件被禁用（`plugins.entries.feishu.enabled=false`）会导致 Feishu WebSocket 连接未建立、飞书消息无法收到；处理是 `openclaw plugins enable feishu` 并重启 Gateway，确认 bot open_id 解析成功、ws client ready、Gateway health OK 且 Feishu configured。 - Exception: for Feishu-specific read/write/document/tool permission issues after script + AI repair fail, mention/route to

triage.rationale: The exception contains team-channel operational guidance with identifiable individual names and mention-routing instructions, even though IDs are redacted. It appears project-related rather than purely personal safe experience.
suggested_redactions: Replace individual names with role-based labels or team aliases
Remove or keep redacted all Feishu user identifiers and mention targets
Generalize internal routing instructions to avoid naming specific people
Consider redacting source references, hashes, and internal channel metadata if released outside the team context
